circular-rendering.options.title: Circular Rendering
circular-rendering.option.render_radius_: Scales the render radius (percentage). Lower values reduce the left/right radius, making culling more aggressive.
circular-rendering.option.enable_vertica: When enabled, the slider below limits vertical render layers.
circular-rendering.option.vertical_range: Number of chunk layers (16 blocks each) to render above and below the player.
circular-rendering.option.preset.tooltip: Quickly switch between predefined configurations. Aggressiveness order: Aggressive (30% scale, 3 layers) > Performance (70% scale, 10 layers) > Balanced (100% scale, vanilla). Balanced presets also have optimization effects.
